view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a monthly credit allowance of 4 massage credits is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a monthly credit allowance of 4 massage credits is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of a monthly credit allowance of 4 massage credits through the linked use case, which explicitly states that the spa membership includes 4 service credits per month. Additionally, the prior step evidence confirms that a customer has booked services using these credits, demonstrating that the system is functioning as intended. The evidence from the linked use case and the successful booking steps provides concrete support for the requirement being met.
